module.name: metrics
module.description: Shows one headline number at huge size for impact (a KPI, result or stat), with a caption and optional supporting text from the body.
module.aiSpec:
Show a SINGLE headline number at huge size for impact (KPIs, results, key stats). Use one metrics block per number; for several numbers side by side wrap several @metrics in a @multicolumn, and for a labelled data table use @table instead. The big number and caption come from params; the BODY (between the directive and <!-- @end -->) is an optional supporting description shown smaller below. Parameters: • value — the big number/text to display, e.g. 100%, 1/10, 3.2× (required). • label — the caption under the number (default "Achievement Rate"). • color — color of the big number (default var(--accent-color)). • valueSize — CSS font-size of the big number (default 5em). • align — text alignment of the whole block: left / center / right (default center). • background — card background color (default blank = light grey #fafafa). • trend — small trend arrow beside the number: none / up (green ▲) / down (red ▼) (default none).
<!-- @metrics value: 1/10, label: Execution Time Reduction, trend: down --> Achieved a dramatic performance improvement compared to the conventional system. <!-- @end -->

param.name: label
param.label: Label
param.desc: Caption shown under the big number.

param.name: valueSize
param.label: Value size
param.desc: CSS font-size of the big number (e.g. 5em, 72px).

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Text alignment of the whole block.

param.name: background
param.label: Card background
param.desc: Background color of the card; blank keeps the default light grey.

param.name: trend
param.label: Trend arrow
param.desc: Small trend indicator shown next to the number.

snippet.label: Big Metrics
snippet.text: <!-- @metrics value: 1/10, label: Execution Time Reduction, color: var(--accent-color) --> Achieved a dramatic performance improvement compared to the conventional system. <!-- @end -->
